specific_question: As of Q4 2024, what training do MediConn Solutions customer service representatives (CSR) receive concerning billing explanations and post-visit processes?
answer: As of Q4 2024, CSRs are required to complete a 2-day onboarding covering basic platform navigation and billing structures. The training lacks detailed scripts for handling complex scenarios like insurance coordination, corporate plan variations, or province-specific processes. After a September 2024 training, MediConn customer service representatives indicated on a post-training questionnaire that 8/10 times they escalated these inquiries to their supervisors.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
